title: Upari
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Upari.png|thumb|right|150px|An Upari crystal]]
'''Upari''' was a type of [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] primarily encountered scattered in the [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of forest [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. It was brittle but versatile, and a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] could get it to produce many effects. A [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] clan on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] could cut an Upari stone to use as decorative jewelry. The cutting altered the effects of the [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] making it more powerful.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Galactic Strongholds]]''
